title: Senior Plant Manager at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
